CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-19-2002 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE FILE FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. THEREFORE, THE CASE IS ORDERED DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, the case is ordered dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2001 Continued To Feb-19-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
